211102011022221101220111221212101002000000120210 - ASI: 30

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  20 = 2 * 0
  21 = 2 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  100 = 1 * 00
  110 = 11 * 0
  121 = 1 * 21
  210 = 21 * 0
  0000 = 00 * 00
  0111 = 01 * 11
  0120 = 01 * 20
  0122 = 01 * 22
  2211 = 22 * 11
  11022 = 110 * 22
  21110 = 21 * 110
  22121 = 22 * 121
  200000 = 20 * 0000
  210100 = 210 * 100
  0120210 = 0120 * 210
  2011022 = 20 * 11022
  01220111 = 0122 * 0111
  22121210100 = 22121 * 210100
  211102011022 = 21110 * 2011022
  221101220111 = 2211 * 01220111
  2000000120210 = 200000 * 0120210
  211102011022221101220111 = 211102011022 * 221101220111
  221212101002000000120210 = 22121210100 * 2000000120210
  211102011022221101220111221212101002000000120210 = 211102011022221101220111 * 221212101002000000120210
